2197350.name: The Simulacra Trilogy Artbook
2197350.description:
The Simulacra Trilogy Artbook is a comprehensive look at the design and art behind the hit horror series. Each game is lovingly dissected, with characters discussed and concepts explored. Kaigan Games and Neon Doctrine are proud to present a window into the dark heart of the Simulacra Universe.

Includes:


  • 40 pages of incredible art and insights
  • Behind the scenes photographs
  • Concept art and cartoons of various key characters
  • Indepth analysis of Simulacra antagonists
  • Years of love and commitment from the team at Kaigan Games
